title: peristrophe baphica
intro: Peristrophe baphica, also known as the banyan vine or the banyan flower, is a tropical plant belonging to the Acanthaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Peristrophe baphica include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
